form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 17 length eighth over 400m at this track. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in home straight.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 400m at this track behind Special Players beaten 10 lengths (23.73). Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked on first turn and fell.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 400m at this track beaten 3 lengths (23.27) behind Invictus Harmony in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th over 400m at this track beaten 3 lengths (23.27) behind Invictus Harmony in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (23.51) at this track over 400m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 9 lengths (23.17) behind Rooster Legs in a Grade 5 on April 13. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.
